member.name: T:System.Net.Mime.MediaTypeMap
member.summary: Provides methods for mapping between file extensions and media types (MIME types).

member.name: M:System.Net.Mime.MediaTypeMap.GetMediaType(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the media type (MIME type) for the specified file path or extension.
member.param: A file path or extension (with or without leading period).
member.returns: The media type associated with the extension, or if no mapping exists.

member.name: M:System.Net.Mime.MediaTypeMap.GetExtension(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the file extension for the specified media type (MIME type).
member.param: The media type (e.g. "application/pdf").
member.returns: The file extension (with leading period) associated with the media type, or if no mapping exists.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidAuthorNameRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the InvalidAuthorNameRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidAuthorNameRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidAuthorNameRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidAuthorNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidAuthorNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidAuthorNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidAuthorNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidAuthorNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidAuthorNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiWordChars
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.DiagnosticIds.DiagnosticIds
member.summary: Various diagnostic IDs reported by this repo.
member.remarks: When adding a new diagnostic ID, add a corresponding suppression to the root Directory.Build.targets file, and add a documentation entry to docs/list-of-diagnostics.md.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.DiagnosticIds.DiagnosticIds.Experiments
member.summary: Experiments supported by this repo.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw
member.summary: Defines static methods used to throw exceptions.
member.remarks: The main purpose is to reduce code size, improve performance, and standardize exception messages.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
member.param: Object to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is , or if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to be checked for .
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to which member belongs.
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrWhitespace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws either an or an if the specified string is or whitespace respectively.
member.param: String to be checked for or whitespace.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the string is , or if it is empty.
member.param: String to be checked for or empty.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfBufferTooSmall(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the argument's buffer size is less than the required buffer size.
member.param: The actual buffer size.
The required buffer size.
The name of the parameter to be checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfOutOfRange``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the enum value is not valid.
member.param: The argument to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the collection is , or if it is empty.
member.param: The collection to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.
member.typeparam: The type of objects in the collection.

member.summary: Throws an .

member.summary: Throws an .

A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.
member.remarks: If the is not a , the current exception is raised in a catch block that handles the inner exception.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIAssistantsChatClient
member.summary: Represents an for an OpenAI .

member.summary: The underlying .

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIAssistantsChatClient._metadata
member.summary: Metadata for the client.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIAssistantsChatClient._assistantId
member.summary: The ID of the agent to use.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIAssistantsChatClient._defaultThreadId
member.summary: The thread ID to use if none is supplied in .

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIAssistantsChatClient._assistantTools
member.summary: List of tools associated with the assistant.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIAssistantsChatClient.#ctor(OpenAI.Assistants.AssistantClient,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class for the specified .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class for the specified .

member.summary: Converts an Extensions function to an OpenAI assistants function tool.

member.summary: Creates the to use for the request and extracts any function result contents that need to be submitted as tool results.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIAssistantsChatClient.ConvertFunctionResultsToToolOutput(System.Collections.Generic.List{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.FunctionResultContent},System.Collections.Generic.List{OpenAI.Assistants.ToolOutput}@)
member.summary: Convert instances to instances.
member.param: The tool results to process.
The generated list of tool outputs, if any could be created.
member.returns: The run ID associated with the corresponding function call requests.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIAssistantsChatClient.ToolDefinitionNameEqualityComparer
member.summary: Provides the same behavior as , except for it compares names so that two function tool definitions with the same name compare equally.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIChatClient
member.summary: Represents an for an OpenAI or .

member.summary: Metadata about the client.

member.summary: The underlying .

member.param: The underlying client.

member.summary: Converts an Extensions function to an OpenAI chat tool.

member.summary: Converts an Extensions chat message enumerable to an OpenAI chat message enumerable.

member.summary: Converts a list of to a list of .

member.summary: Converts an OpenAI role to an Extensions role.

member.summary: Creates s from .
member.param: The content parts to convert into a content.
The result collection into which to write the resulting content.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIChatClient.ToAIContent(OpenAI.Chat.ChatMessageContentPart)
member.summary: Creates an from a .
member.param: The content part to convert into a content.
member.returns: The constructed , or if the content part could not be converted.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIChatClient.FromOpenAIFinishReason(System.Nullable{OpenAI.Chat.ChatFinishReason})
member.summary: Converts an OpenAI finish reason to an Extensions finish reason.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIChatClient.SanitizeAuthorName(System.String)
member.summary: Sanitizes the author name to be appropriate for including as an OpenAI participant name.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIChatClient.FunctionCallInfo
member.summary: POCO representing function calling info. Used to concatenation information for a single function call from across multiple streaming updates.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIChatClient.TryGetReasoningDelta(OpenAI.Chat.StreamingChatCompletionUpdate,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to extract reasoning text from a streaming chat completion update's Patch.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIChatClient.TryGetReasoningMessage(OpenAI.Chat.ChatCompletion,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to extract reasoning text from a non-streaming chat completion's Patch.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIChatClient.InvalidAuthorNameRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[^a-zA-Z0-9_]+
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [^0-9A-Z_a-z] atomically at least once.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for working with s.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.StrictKey
member.summary: Key into AdditionalProperties used to store a strict option.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.DefaultOpenAIEndpoint
member.summary: Gets the default OpenAI endpoint.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.ChatRoleDeveloper
member.summary: Gets a for "developer".

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.PythonMediaType
member.summary: Gets the media type for Python code content.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.StrictSchemaTransformCache
member.summary: Gets the JSON schema transformer cache conforming to OpenAI strict / structured output restrictions per https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/structured-outputs?api-mode=responses#supported-schemas.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.AsIChatClient(OpenAI.Chat.ChatClient)
member.summary: Gets an for use with this .
member.param: The client.
member.returns: An that can be used to converse via the .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.AsIChatClient(OpenAI.Responses.ResponsesClient,System.String)
member.summary: Gets an for use with this .
member.param: The client.
The default model ID to use for the chat client.
member.returns: An that can be used to converse via the .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.AsIChatClient(OpenAI.Assistants.AssistantClient,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets an for use with this .
member.param: The instance to be accessed as an .
The unique identifier of the assistant with which to interact.

An optional existing thread identifier for the chat session. This serves as a default, and may be overridden per call to or via the property. If no thread ID is provided via either mechanism, a new thread will be created for the request.
member.returns: An instance configured to interact with the specified agent and thread.
member.exception: is empty or composed entirely of whitespace.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.AsIChatClient(OpenAI.Assistants.AssistantClient,OpenAI.Assistants.Assistant,System.String)
member.summary: Gets an for use with this .
member.param: The instance to be accessed as an .
The with which to interact.

An optional existing thread identifier for the chat session. This serves as a default, and may be overridden per call to or via the property. If no thread ID is provided via either mechanism, a new thread will be created for the request.
member.returns: An instance configured to interact with the specified agent and thread.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.AsISpeechToTextClient(OpenAI.Audio.AudioClient)
member.summary: Gets an for use with this .
member.param: The client.
member.returns: An that can be used to transcribe audio via the .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.AsITextToSpeechClient(OpenAI.Audio.AudioClient)
member.summary: Gets an for use with this .
member.param: The client.
member.returns: An that can be used to generate speech via the .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.AsIImageGenerator(OpenAI.Images.ImageClient)
member.summary: Gets an for use with this .
member.param: The client.
member.returns: An that can be used to generate images via the .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.AsIEmbeddingGenerator(OpenAI.Embeddings.EmbeddingClient,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Gets an for use with this .
member.param: The client.
The number of dimensions to generate in each embedding.
member.returns: An that can be used to generate embeddings via the .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.AsIHostedFileClient(OpenAI.OpenAIClient)
member.summary: Gets an for use with this .
member.param: The client.
member.returns: An that can be used to manage files via the .
member.remarks: The returned supports both the standard Files API and container files (used for code interpreter outputs). To download a container file, specify the container ID in the property.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.AsIHostedFileClient(OpenAI.Files.OpenAIFileClient)
member.summary: Gets an for use with this .
member.param: The client.
member.returns: An that can be used to manage files via the .
member.remarks: The returned supports only the standard Files API. Operations requiring container access (via Scope) will throw . To access container files, use or .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.AsIHostedFileClient(OpenAI.Containers.ContainerClient,System.String)
member.summary: Gets an for use with this .
member.param: The client.
The default container ID for operations. If not specified, a container ID must be provided via the Scope property on per-call options.
member.returns: An that can be used to manage files within containers via the .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.HasStrict(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Gets whether the properties specify that strict schema handling is desired.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.ToOpenAIFunctionParameters(Microsoft.Extensions.AI.AIFunctionDeclaration,System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Extracts from an the parameters and strictness setting for use with OpenAI's APIs.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.ParseCallContent(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of parsing arguments using a specified encoding and parser.
member.param: The input arguments to be parsed.
The function call ID.
The function name.
member.returns: A new instance of containing the parse result.

member.summary: Creates a new instance of parsing arguments using a specified encoding and parser.

member.returns: A new instance of containing the parse result.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.ImageUriToMediaType(System.Uri)
member.summary: Gets a media type for an image based on the file extension in the provided URI.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.PatchModelIfNotSet(System.ClientModel.Primitives.JsonPatch@,System.String)
member.summary: Sets $.model in to if not already set.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.GetProperty``1(Microsoft.Extensions.AI.AITool,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the typed property of the specified name from the tool's .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.IsConversationId(System.String)
member.summary: Gets whether an ID is an OpenAI conversation ID.
member.remarks: Technically, OpenAI's IDs are opaque. However, by convention conversation IDs start with "conv_" and we can use that to disambiguate whether we're looking at a conversation ID or something else, like a response ID.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.ToolJson
member.summary: Used to create the JSON payload for an OpenAI tool description.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.OpenAIApiTypeTag
member.summary: The "openai.api.type" tag name per the OpenTelemetry semantic conventions for OpenAI.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.OpenAIApiTypeChatCompletions
member.summary: The "chat_completions" value for the "openai.api.type" tag.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.OpenAIApiTypeResponses
member.summary: The "responses" value for the "openai.api.type" tag.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.ChatOperationName
member.summary: The "chat" operation name used by the OpenTelemetry chat client.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIClientExtensions.AddOpenAIApiType(System.String)
member.summary: If the current represents a "chat" operation span, adds the "openai.api.type" tag with the specified value.

The file name.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient
member.summary: An implementation for OpenAI file operations.

remarks.para: This client supports both the standard Files API and container-scoped files (used for code interpreter outputs). When a (container ID) is specified on a per-call options object or as the default scope at construction time, operations target that container. Otherwise, operations use the standard Files API.
Depending on how this client is constructed, it may support only file operations, only container operations, or both. If an operation requires a client that was not provided, an is thrown.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient._fileClient
member.summary: The underlying for standard file operations, or if not available.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient._containerClient
member.summary: The underlying for container file operations, or if not available.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient._defaultScope
member.summary: The default scope (container ID) for operations, or if not set.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient._metadata
member.summary: The metadata for this client.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient.#ctor(OpenAI.OpenAIClient)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from an .
member.param: The underlying .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient.#ctor(OpenAI.Files.OpenAIFileClient)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from an .
member.param: The underlying .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient.#ctor(OpenAI.Containers.ContainerClient,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from a .
member.param: The underlying .
The default container ID for operations. If not specified, a container ID must be provided via the property on per-call options.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient.ParseContainerFileJson(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Parses container file metadata from a JSON element into a .
member.remarks: This parses raw JSON rather than using the OpenAI SDK's typed deserialization, as a workaround for , where the SDK crashes deserializing container files when the "bytes" field is null. Once the SDK issue is fixed, call sites should revert to using the typed API.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient.ResolveScope(Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions)
member.summary: Resolves the scope (container ID) from per-call options or the default.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient.HttpContentBinaryContent
member.summary: A that writes an directly to the output stream.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient.HttpContentBinaryContent.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpContent)
member.summary: A that writes an directly to the output stream.

member.summary: A that does not dispose the underlying stream.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAIHostedFileClient.NonDisposingStreamContent.#ctor(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: A that does not dispose the underlying stream.

member.summary: Whether the session has been disposed (0 = false, 1 = true).

member.summary: Connects the WebSocket to the OpenAI Realtime API.
member.param: The to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous connect operation.
member.exception: The session was not created with an owned realtime client.

member.param: The format.

member.name: M:OpenAI.Responses.MicrosoftExtensionsAIResponsesExtensions.Add(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.AITool},OpenAI.Responses.ResponseTool)
member.summary: Adds the to the list of s.
member.param: The list of s to which the provided tool should be added.
The to add.
member.remarks: does not derive from , so it cannot be added directly to a list of s. Instead, this method wraps the provided in an and adds that to the list. The returned by will be able to unwrap the when it processes the list of tools and use the provided as-is.

member.name: M:OpenAI.Responses.MicrosoftExtensionsAIResponsesExtensions.AsAITool(OpenAI.Responses.ResponseTool)
member.summary: Creates an to represent a raw .
member.param: The tool to wrap as an .

remarks.para: The returned tool is only suitable for use with the returned by (or s that delegate to such an instance). It is likely to be ignored by any other implementation.

When a tool has a corresponding -derived type already defined in Microsoft.Extensions.AI, such as , , , or , those types should be preferred instead of this method, as they are more portable, capable of being respected by any implementation. This method does not attempt to map the supplied to any of those types, it simply wraps it as-is: the returned by will be able to unwrap the when it processes the list of tools.
